title: Add strikethrough support to markdown renderer
description: pulldown-cmark already parses ~~text~~ as Tag::Strikethrough. Need to: 1) add strikethrough bool to TextStyle in terminal.rs, 2) add with_strikethrough() to StyledSpan, 3) emit SetAttribute(CrossedOut)/Reset in write_to and write_to_width, 4) handle Tag::Strikethrough/TagEnd::Strikethrough in highlight/markdown.rs. Design: ai/design/chat-rendering-enhancements.md
